title: Machine Learning Implementation Steps Part 10B Cheat Sheet
printNote: Quick reference for Machine Learning Implementation Steps Part 10B in Machine Learning.

entries.syntax: # Python implementation for Machine Learning Implementation Steps Part 10B
entries.example:
# Python implementation for Machine Learning Implementation Steps Part 10B
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
entries.description: Basic syntax for Machine Learning Implementation Steps Part 10B
